'''gaburu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jocoque|jocoque]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-b-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jocoque|jocoque]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gaburu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæbirith|gæbirith]] || [[word:gæbirij|gæbirij]] || [[word:gæbirish|gæbirish]] || [[word:gæbiri|gæbiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gabuburuth|gabuburuth]] || [[word:gabuburuj|gabuburuj]] || [[word:gabuburush|gabuburush]] || [[word:gabuburu|gabuburu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gaburuth|gaburuth]] || [[word:gaburuj|gaburuj]] || [[word:gaburush|gaburush]] || [[word:gaburu|gaburu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gabufruth|gabufruth]] || [[word:gabufruj|gabufruj]] || [[word:gabufrush|gabufrush]] || [[word:gabufruf|gabufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gaburuthu|gaburuthu]] || [[word:gaburuju|gaburuju]] || [[word:gaburushu|gaburushu]] || [[word:gaburuku|gaburuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gaburuth|gaburuth]] || [[word:gaburuj|gaburuj]] || [[word:gaburush|gaburush]] || [[word:gaburu|gaburu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gaburuthul|gaburuthul]] || [[word:gaburujul|gaburujul]] || [[word:gaburushul|gaburushul]] || [[word:gaburukul|gaburukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gaburuthuthu|gaburuthuthu]] || [[word:gaburujuju|gaburujuju]] || [[word:gaburushushu|gaburushushu]] || [[word:gaburuku|gaburuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gaburuthun|gaburuthun]] || [[word:gaburujun|gaburujun]] || [[word:gaburushun|gaburushun]] || [[word:gaburukun|gaburukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gaburuthuoro|gaburuthuoro]] || [[word:gaburujuoro|gaburujuoro]] || [[word:gaburushuoro|gaburushuoro]] || [[word:gaburukuoro|gaburukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
